s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 3 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the parking brake cable clamp to the No. 3 parking brake cable assembly.
Install the No. 3 parking brake cable assembly with the 3 bolts (A), the bolt (B) and the nut (C), and engage each claw.
Install the No. 3 parking brake cable assembly to the backing plate with the 2 bolts.
Using a brass bar and a hammer, install the clip to the No. 3 parking brake cable assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 2 PARKING BRAKE SHOE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using needle-nose pliers, connect the No. 3 parking brake cable assembly to the parking brake shoe lever.

Install the No. 2 parking brake shoe assembly with the parking brake shoe hold down spring No. 2 pin, the parking brake shoe hold down spring No. 2 cup, the parking brake shoe hold down spring and the parking brake shoe hold down spring No. 1 cup.
Engage the claw of the parking brake shoe hold down spring No. 1 cup to the No. 2 parking brake shoe assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PARKING BRAKE SHOE ADJUSTING SCREW SET

s2.ptxt: Apply high temperature grease to the parking brake adjusting screw as shown in the illustration.
Install the parking brake shoe return tension No. 2 spring to the No. 1 parking brake shoe assembly and the No. 2 parking brake shoe assembly.
Install the parking brake shoe adjusting screw set to the No. 1 parking brake shoe assembly and the No. 2 parking brake shoe assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 PARKING BRAKE SHOE ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 1 parking brake shoe assembly with the parking brake shoe hold down spring No. 1 pin, parking brake shoe hold down spring No. 2 cup, parking brake shoe hold down spring and parking brake shoe hold down spring No. 1 cup.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PARKING BRAKE SHOE STRUT

s2.ptxt: Attach the parking brake shoe strut and the parking brake shoe strut compression spring to the No. 1 parking brake shoe assembly and No. 2 parking brake shoe assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PARKING BRAKE SHOE RETURN TENSION NO. 1 SPRING

s2.ptxt: Using needle-nose pliers, install the 2 parking brake shoe return tension No. 1 springs.

atten4.ptxt: First install the front side spring and then the rear side spring.

s-1.ptxt: CHECK PARKING BRAKE INSTALLATION

s2.ptxt: Check that each part is installed properly.

atten3.ptxt: There should be no oil or grease on the friction surface of the shoe lining and disc.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DISC

s2.ptxt: Align the matchmarks and install the rear disc.

s-1.ptxt: ADJUST PARKING BRAKE SHOE CLEARANCE

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the hub nuts.
Remove the shoe adjusting hole plug.
Turn the adjuster and expand the shoes until the disc locks.
Contract the shoe adjuster until the disc rotates smoothly.
Check that the shoe has no brake drag.
Install the shoe adjusting hole plug.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DISC BRAKE CALIPER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the rear disc brake caliper assembly with the 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR WHEEL
INSTALL NO. 2 FRONT FLOOR HEAT LOWER INSULATOR (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 2 front floor heat lower insulator with the 3 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CENTER EXHAUST PIPE ASSEMBLY (for 2AZ-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install a new gasket onto the front exhaust pipe.
Install the center exhaust pipe assembly with the 2 bolts and 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL EXHAUST CENTER PIPE ASSEMBLY (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install a new gasket to the exhaust center pipe assembly.
Install the exhaust center pipe to the exhaust front pipe with the 2 nuts and 2 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL EXHAUST TAIL PIPE ASSEMBLY (for 2GR-FE)

s2.ptxt: Install 2 new gaskets to the exhaust tail pipes.
Install the 2 exhaust tail pipes with the 4 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 4 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Install the No. 4 parking brake cable assembly to the parking brake equalizer.
Slide the rubber boot back as shown in the illustration.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT NO. 2 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Connect the No. 2 parking brake cable assembly to the parking brake equalizer.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT NO. 3 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Connect the No. 3 parking brake cable assembly to the parking brake equalizer.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CROSS MEMBER FLOOR NO. 4 REINFORCEMENT SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Install the cross member floor No. 4 reinforcement sub-assembly with the 8 bolts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT FLOOR CARPET ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 6 clamps and the 2 claws and install the front floor carpet assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LUGGAGE DOOR LOCK OPEN LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw and install the luggage door open lever sub-assembly with the screw.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Pass the No. 1 parking brake cable assembly through the parking brake lever sub-assembly.
Temporarily tighten the lock nut and the No. 1 wire adjusting nut.

atten3.ptxt: Fully tighten the lock nut when adjusting the parking brake lever travel.

s2.ptxt: Bend the parking brake lever claw.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PARKING BRAKE LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Manual Transaxle)

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the procedures up to "INSTALL PARKING BRAKE LEVER". (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 PARKING BRAKE CABLE ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Pass the No. 1 parking brake cable assembly through the pedal guide.
Using a brass bar and a hammer, install the clip to the No. 1 parking brake cable assembly.
Temporarily tighten the the lock nut and No. 1 wire adjusting nut.

atten3.ptxt: Fully tighten the lock nut and the No. 1 wire adjusting nut when adjusting the parking brake pedal travel.

s2.ptxt: Bend the parking brake pedal claw.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PARKING BRAKE PEDAL ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Transaxle)

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the procedures up to "INSTALL PARKING BRAKE PEDAL". (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the procedures up to "INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Manual Seat)". (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the procedures up to "INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)". (See page )

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT PARKING BRAKE LEVER TRAVEL (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Pull the parking brake lever firmly.
Release the parking brake lock, and return the parking brake lever to its off position.
Slowly pull the parking brake lever all the way up, and count the number of clicks.

specitem.ptxt: 7 to 9 notches at 200 N (20 kgf, 45 lbf)

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT PARKING BRAKE PEDAL TRAVEL (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Fully depress the parking brake pedal and release it to engage the parking brake.
Depress the pedal to the floor again, and release it to disengage the parking brake.
Slowly depress the parking brake pedal to the floor, and count the number of clicks.

specitem.ptxt: 7 to 10 notches at 300 N (31 kgf, 67 lbf)

s-1.ptxt: ADJUST PARKING BRAKE LEVER TRAVEL (for Manual Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Pull up the parking brake lever. Hold the No. 1 wire adjusting nut using a wrench and loosen the lock nut.
Release the parking brake lever.
Turn the No. 1 wire adjusting nut until the parking brake lever travel meets the above specification.
Hold the No. 1 wire adjusting nut using a wrench or an equivalent tool and tighten the lock nut.
Count the number of clicks after depressing and releasing the parking brake lever 3 or 4 times.
Check whether the parking brake drags.
When operating the parking brake lever, check that the parking brake indicator light comes on.

s-1.ptxt: ADJUST PARKING BRAKE PEDAL TRAVEL (for Automatic Transaxle)

s2.ptxt: Depress the parking brake pedal. Hold the No. 1 wire adjusting nut using a wrench and loosen the lock nut.
Release the parking brake pedal.
Turn the No. 1 wire adjusting nut until the parking brake pedal travel meets the above specification.
Hold the No. 1 wire adjusting nut using a wrench or an equivalent tool and tighten the lock nut.
Count the number of clicks after depressing and releasing the parking brake pedal 3 or 4 times.
Check whether the parking brake drags.
When operating the parking brake pedal, check that the parking brake indicator light comes on.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL (for Manual Seat)
PERFORM ZERO POINT CALIBRATION AND SENSITIVITY CHECK
INSPECT SRS WARNING LIGHT
INSPECT SLIDE ADJUSTER LOCK (for Manual Seat)
INSPECT FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Check the power seat operation.
Check the seat heater operation (with seat heater system).

s3.ptxt: Turn the seat heater switch ON.
Wait 5 minutes or more and confirm that the seat surface becomes warm.

s-1.ptxt: CHECK FOR EXHAUST GAS LEAKS

content1.ptxt: If gas is leaking, tighten the areas necessary to stop the leak. Replace the damaged parts as necessary.
